title: share: Assuming $pmux inputs are onehot is unsound.

features.name: casez with parallel_case creating pmux
features.description: Code should include a casez statement with parallel_case attribute that creates a $pmux cell in the netlist
features.snippet:
(* parallel_case *)
casez (op)
  3'b??1: begin X = A & B; Y = A & C; end
  3'b?1?: begin X = A | B; Y = A | C; end
  3'b1??: begin X = A ^ B; Y = A ^ C; end
endcase

features.name: shared select signal used in non-onehot context
features.description: Code should include a select signal (op) that is used both in a $pmux context (casez with parallel_case) and independently in if statements where multiple bits can be true simultaneously (op[0] and op[1] can both be 1)
features.snippet:
if (op[0]) X = A * B; else X = 0;
if (op[1]) Y = A * C; else Y = 0;
